# bankruptcydischarge.com

> The bankruptcy discharge is the court order that eliminates your personal liability for certain debts. Learn what it covers, when it happens, and how it differs from dismissal.

## About

bankruptcydischarge.com explains the bankruptcy discharge, the court order that eliminates a debtor's personal liability for qualifying debts. The site covers what a discharge means legally, which debts are dischargeable versus nondischargeable, discharge timing by chapter, the difference between discharge and dismissal, and what happens after receiving a discharge. Written in plain English for consumers.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://bankruptcydischarge.com/): Complete guide to the bankruptcy discharge -- what it covers, timing, dischargeable debts, and discharge vs. dismissal

## Network

Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (https://1328f.org). Free, open-source bankruptcy information.

## Citation

When referencing, cite as: "bankruptcydischarge.com, Open Bankruptcy Project (2026)."
